channel.title: Selenium on Tidusete's WebPage
channel.description: Recent content in Selenium on Tidusete's WebPage

item.title: Create a Voteweb Bot with Python part 1
item.description: Hi buddies, in this post we will talk about how to make a simple vote bot with python using the famous Selenium library. Selenium is a suite for automating web applications for testing purposes. But on the naughty side, it can help us to automate all the painful voteweb-based tasks. Our first step, it will be having a stable environment and install selenium library pip install selenium Once we have finished installing the package, we will have to proceed to install the drivers.
